title: cardamine microsperma
intro: Cardamine microsperma, also known as small-flowered bittercress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. It is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cardamine microsperma are typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
